billing_cycle.slave_needs_init_from_master: No active billing cycle. This satellite register must be initialized from the main register first.
billing_cycle.cannot_delete_active: The active billing cycle cannot be deleted.
billing_cycle.master_has_no_active: No active billing cycle on the main register.

notfall_import.billing_cycle_mismatch: Billing cycle mismatch (export cycle ≠ target cycle). Import cancelled.

join_request.not_found_or_handled: Join request not found or already processed.

config.master_ws_url_missing: Main register URL is not configured (Settings).
config.my_sync_url_missing: Your sync URL is not configured (Settings).

join.master_has_no_active_billing_cycle: Cannot join: main register did not provide an active billing cycle.
join.local_bookings_billing_cycle_mismatch: Cannot join: this register already has bookings in billing cycle {{localBillingCycleId}} (active locally), but the main register is on {{masterBillingCycleId}}. Align billing cycles (e.g. reset) and try again.
join.local_bookings_no_active_cycle: Cannot join: this register already has local bookings but no active billing cycle. Check or align the billing cycle (e.g. reset) and try again.

leave.slave_only: Disconnecting is only available on satellite registers.

sync.invalid_url_missing_port: Invalid sync URL (port missing, e.g. wss://IP:8766).
sync.peer_state_unknown: Sync state for {{peerId}} is unknown. Please wait for sync.
sync.incomplete_receipts: Sync incomplete: receipts from {{peerId}} are missing on the main register (main: {{masterSeq}}, peer: {{peerSeq}}). Please wait for sync.
sync.incomplete_voids: Sync incomplete: voids from {{peerId}} are missing on the main register. Please wait for sync.
sync.join_master_only: Join is only allowed on the main register.
sync.first_message_invalid: First message must be join_request or sync_state.
sync.join_pending_approval: Request saved. Waiting for approval by the main register.
sync.leave_master_only: Leave-network is only accepted by the main register.
sync.closeout_master_only: Closeout requests are only accepted by the main register.
sync.closeout_receipts_pending: Not all receipts from this satellite are on the main register yet. Please wait for sync.
sync.closeout_voids_pending: Not all voids from this satellite are on the main register yet. Please wait for sync.
sync.reset_master_only: Reset requests are only accepted by the main register.
sync.reset_slave_data_pending: Not all data from the satellite is on the main register yet. Please wait for sync.
sync.reset_peers_pending: Not all connected registers have received all receipts from this satellite. Please wait for sync and try again.
sync.batch_billing_cycle_mismatch: Sync batch belongs to a different billing cycle. Check billing cycle state.

peer.master_only: Only available on the main register.
peer.cannot_remove_self: You cannot remove your own register.
peer.not_found_or_detached: Register not found or already detached.

tls.fingerprint_mismatch: TLS certificate fingerprint does not match pin for {{peerId}} (expected {{expected}}, got {{actual}}).

internal.sync_connections_unavailable: Sync connection manager is not available.

join.network_complete: Joined the network. Peers, merchants, and billing cycle data were applied.

slave_reset.complete: Local billing cycle was cleared and aligned with the main register.

closeout.confirmed: Closeout confirmed: the main register has all data for this register. You can disconnect.

leave.detached: Satellite register was disconnected locally (main/peers cleared).

sync.started: Server started, sync to {{peerCount}} peer(s) started. Removed {{removedSelfLoops}} self-connection(s).

billing_cycle.reset: Billing cycle reset. Merchant list and registers unchanged.

syncStatus.noPeers: No other registers on the network.

home.title: Point of sale
home.syncFetchError: Unable to load sync status. Check settings or restart the application.
home.detachConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect this register?
home.joinSearchAgain: Search for main register again in Settings
home.joinNoMaster: No main register found. Enter the URL in Settings or search again later.
home.closeoutHint: When your shift ends, request closeout confirmation from the main register in Settings.
home.joinUrlRequired: Please enter your own sync URL.

cashRegister.title: Cash register – {{name}}
cashRegister.blockNotInitialized: This register is not aligned with a main register. Set up as main register in Settings or join the main register.
cashRegister.blockNoActiveCycle: No active billing cycle. Start a billing cycle in Settings.
cashRegister.unknownMerchantsIntro: The following merchant number(s) are not on the merchant list:
cashRegister.quickEntryPlaceholder: Quick entry: merchant number amount (Enter for next line)
cashRegister.bookingsBlocked: Bookings are not possible right now.
cashRegister.minOneLine: At least one line with merchant number and amount is required.
